headlines.headline: Arnik Commerce announces $7.9B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A $7.9B share buyback program is a strong signal of capital allocation confidence and provides immediate support to earnings per share.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
